tools.name: checkMonitors
tools.description: Check all monitors and their statuses.

tools.name: createDashboard
tools.description: Create a new dashboard from a JSON document. The dashboard JSON must include required fields: name, owner, charts, layout, refreshTime, schemaVersion (2), timeWindowStart, timeWindowEnd. Set owner to

tools.name: deleteDashboard
tools.description: Delete a dashboard by its UID. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: exportDashboard
tools.description: Export a dashboard as JSON by its UID. Returns the full dashboard document that can be used to create or update dashboards via the API.

tools.name: getDashboard
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific dashboard by UID.

tools.name: getDatasetFields
tools.description: List all fields in a dataset.

tools.name: getMetricTagValues
tools.description: List all values for a specific tag in a metrics dataset. Useful for discovering filter values before querying.

tools.name: getMonitorHistory
tools.description: Get recent check history of monitor. Use the checkMonitors() tool to list all the monitors.

tools.name: getSavedQueries
tools.description: Retrieve saved/starred queries from Axiom - shows APL queries that users have bookmarked for reuse

tools.name: listDashboards
tools.description: List all available dashboards. Shows user-created dashboards with their metadata.

tools.name: listDatasets
tools.description: List all available datasets. For datasets you are curious about, use getDatasetFields() tool to find their schema.

tools.name: listMetrics
tools.description: List all available metrics in a metrics dataset (kind

tools.name: listMetricTags
tools.description: List all available tags (dimensions) in a metrics dataset. Tags can be used to filter and group metrics queries.

tools.name: queryDataset
tools.description: # Instructions 1. Query Axiom datasets using Axiom Processing Language (APL). The query must be a valid APL query string. 2. tools.name: queryMetrics
tools.description: # Instructions 1. Query OpenTelemetry metrics stored in Axiom using MPL (Metrics Processing Language). NOT APL. 2. The query targets a metrics dataset (kind

tools.name: searchMetrics
tools.description: Start here when the user mentions a specific service, host, or entity name and you need to work with metrics data. tools.name: updateDashboard
tools.description: Update an existing dashboard by UID. Provide the full dashboard JSON document. Use overwrite=true to skip version conflict checks (last-write-wins), or provide the current version number for optimistic concurrency control.

prompts.name: correlate-events-across-datasets
prompts.description: Find patterns and correlations between events across multiple datasets

prompts.name: data-quality-investigation
prompts.description: Investigate data quality issues including missing data, inconsistencies, and collection problems

prompts.name: detect-anomalies-in-events
prompts.description: Generic anomaly detection using statistical analysis and pattern recognition across any event dataset

prompts.name: establish-performance-baseline
prompts.description: Establish performance baselines for a dataset to enable effective monitoring and anomaly detection

prompts.name: explore-unknown-dataset
prompts.description: Systematic exploration of an unknown dataset to understand its structure, content, and potential use cases

prompts.name: monitor-health-analysis
prompts.description: Comprehensive analysis of monitor health, alert patterns, and effectiveness
